title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Borosil - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
